case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. SHOWROOM AUTO & ISUZU TRUCK CENTER, LLC DBA et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER WAIVING APPEARANCE OF WITNESS AT DEFAULT HEARING, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2009, DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING. GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LOIS JONES, CSR #3689.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHOWROOM AUTO & ISUZU TRUCK CENTER, LLC DBA SHOWROOM AUTO SUPERCENTER DRUMMONDS, SLOAN F. $160,759.79 PRINCIPAL, $2,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $7,664.70 INTEREST, $495.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $171,419.49, SEE SCANNED DOC
